blueprints.title: Grade 7 Economic Management Sciences Baseline Diagnostic
blueprints.description: Samples approved items across all 16 CAPS topics in grade7_economic_management_sciences_en to establish a starting mastery profile.

blueprints.title: The economy Topic Diagnostic
blueprints.description: Diagnostic covering CAPS 7.EMS.1.1 with balanced difficulty and misconception coverage.

blueprints.title: The economy Short Practice
blueprints.description: Short practice quiz after the standard lesson variant.

blueprints.title: The economy Recheck
blueprints.description: Targets previously missed misconceptions with on-level and challenging items.

blueprints.title: The economy Mastery Check
blueprints.description: End-of-topic check emphasising on-level and challenging application items.
